race.comment: JOHNNY TIGHTLIPS (2) has started favourite at both runs to date but found one better on each occasion. Charged to the lead at the top of the lane here last start but was nailed on the line at the end of 1212m. Like him coming back to this trip - ready to win. ALLUMEUSE (1) settled worse than midfield before chiming in late to get within a length of the winner over this distance at Werribee. That was his first run for nearly five months so there is improvement to come. SIGNED BY A KISS (12) has travelled at the back of the field in her two career runs and is finding the line well without threatening. Draws a much better gate and gets out over a slightly longer trip. Can do a lot better this time. ZOUZENNA (14) raced on the speed and held on well when resuming over 1214m at Moe recently. Strips fitter and can give some cheek coming back a little in distance. TUXEDO MISS (11) can improve third-up from a more favourable alley.
